items.title: The White House app will reportedly be auto-installed on Homeland Security staff's devices
items.summary: The White House app will be automatically loaded onto DHS staff's work phones, Politico said.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Snap unveils $2,195 smart glasses after previous flops
items.summary: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.

items.title: Uber will bring its premium robotaxi service to Houston in 2027
items.summary: This will be the second market to have an Uber robotaxi service outfitted with Lucid EVs equipped with a self-driving system from Nuro.
